Kathy Griffin staged a fake dating post to expose Hollywood ageism.

Kathy Griffin posted a photo with a 22-year-old man, inviting online reactions. She later revealed it was a social experiment to highlight double standards in Hollywood. Griffin noted starkly different reactions on Instagram versus Threads regarding age gaps.

Did this stunt highlight Hollywood’s double standards, or go too far?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
